_meta.reviewWorkflow: Local fetch with the bundled Codex Node is still blocked by outbound network restrictions in this environment, so this file was manually reviewed from primary source pages and release feeds before updating src/data/curated-news.json.

items.title: Realtek Joins OpenTitan Coalition to Develop Discrete Hardware Root of Trust Devices
items.summary: lowRISC and Realtek announced that Realtek joined the OpenTitan coalition and plans to use OpenTitan IP, firmware, and verification collateral to develop discrete hardware root-of-trust devices for networking, telecom, and IoT products.
